imageAlt: Ecosystem - Reduce time to engage with FreeAgent from Mettle setup completion roadmap item preview image
title: Ecosystem - Reduce time to engage with FreeAgent from Mettle setup completion
summaryBody: We want to achieve an increase in the percentage of mettle connected users who actively use FreeAgent within the first month and remain long term active users by enhancing FreeAgent promotion within Mettle at the point of setup completion.
detailBody: We want to achieve an increase in the percentage of mettle connected users who actively use FreeAgent within the first month and remain long term active users by enhancing FreeAgent promotion within Mettle at the point of setup completion.
